scenarios.name: Configure a Gatus endpoint that asserts JSON body health plus response-time SLO with Slack alerts after 3 failures
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented condition syntax ([STATUS] == 200, [RESPONSE_TIME] < 2000, [BODY].status == healthy) and Slack provider with failure-threshold: 3 and send-on-resolved: true; baseline tends to invent fields or use generic HTTP checks rather than Gatus's bracketed placeholders.

scenarios.name: Monitor TCP connectivity for PostgreSQL and SSL certificate expiry on the same Gatus instance
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly uses the tcp:// URL scheme with [CONNECTED] == true and the [CERTIFICATE_EXPIRATION] > 720h condition documented in the skill; baseline typically resorts to external pg_isready scripts or omits the bracketed Gatus placeholders.
